Selected Broadcasts

Conversations and media appearances on crime, justice, and public criminology.

Selected appearances where the work of public criminology meets a public audience. Each links to the original broadcast or recording.

CBC appearances

  • Public safety concerns in Metro Vancouver CBC On The Coast, May 23, 2025

    On the public-safety pressures facing Metro Vancouver and how to read them.

  • The justice system and repeat offenders CBC Radio West, May 22, 2025

    Why the justice system needs to do more when dealing with repeat offenders.

  • Outcome in collapsed $30M drug bust is "devastating" CBC News BC, February 14, 2024

    On what the collapse of a major drug prosecution reveals about the system behind it.

  • Toxic-drug traffickers and the justice system CBC BC Today, February 7, 2024

    On where the justice system fits in the toxic-drug crisis.

Availability

I am available for interviews and commentary on organized crime, victimization, policing policy, and the communication of criminological research to general audiences. For media inquiries, get in touch.

Public criminology. Evidence over anecdote. Understanding before response.
